financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well because it is making more money and keeping costs low.
Key areas like manufacturing and banking are helping the company grow steadily.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Low Risk
bullets: The company faces challenges in a key market due to economic issues, which could hurt its growth.
Unexpected currency losses have affected the company's financial results, despite efforts to manage these risks.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in treating its workers and managing its leadership.
It needs to improve its efforts to protect the environment.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company leaders spoke very positively about their progress and future plans.
They are confident about overcoming challenges and believe in their strategies for success.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Good
bullets: The company's leaders gave some clear answers but didn't always provide detailed numbers or plans.
They need to improve by giving more specific information about their future financial expectations.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Very Poor
bullets: The company is facing challenges in some areas, especially in communications and the Americas.
Despite some progress, the overall feeling from the earnings call is cautious and not very optimistic.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Tech Mahindra is doing well in most areas, especially in manufacturing and finance, which helps its overall growth.
The company is investing in new technology and partnerships, making it a good choice for future potential despite some challenges.
